library:chelsea:hours.evidence: Regular Hours (Sep 4 - Jun 1): Mon-Thu 9am-8pm; Fri & Sat 9am-5pm; closed Sunday
library:chelsea:hours.note: Summer schedule (May 28-Aug 31) differs: Mon/Tue/Wed 9-5, Thu 9-8, Fri 9-5, Sat 10-1

library:tewksbury:hours.note: Saturday and Sunday closed late June through summer

library:arlington:hours.note: Sunday hours run October through May only; closed Sundays June-September

library:lincoln:hours.evidence: Mon 1pm-8:30pm; Tue 9am-6pm; Wed-Thu 9am-8:30pm; Fri 9am-6pm; Sat 10am-5pm; Sun closed
library:lincoln:hours.note: Confirmed by operator from lincolnpl.org 2026-05-29 (page renders hours via JS, not WebFetch-reachable)

library:acton:hours.evidence: Mon-Thu 9 a.m.-9 p.m.; Fri 9-5; Sat 9-5; Sun 2-5 p.m. (main Acton Memorial Library location)

library:weston:hours.note: Summer (Jul/Aug): Saturday reduced to 10am-2pm and Sunday closed

library:belmont:hours.evidence: Mon-Thu 9:00 AM-9:00 PM; Fri-Sat 9:00 AM-5:00 PM; Sun 1:00 PM-5:00 PM

library:wellesley:hours.evidence: Mon-Thu 9am-9pm; Fri 9am-6pm; Sat 9am-5pm; Sun typically 1pm-5pm (main branch)
library:wellesley:hours.note: Sunday may be closed on some dates / school recesses; confirm via libcal calendar

library:watertown:hours.evidence: Mon-Thu 9am-9pm; Fri 9am-7pm; Sat 9am-5pm; Sun 1pm-5pm (main branch, 123 Main St)

library:braintree:hours.evidence: Monday-Thursday, 9 am to 9 pm; Friday and Saturday, 9 am to 5 pm
library:braintree:hours.note: Sunday hours not listed on site; treating as closed. Holiday hours vary.
